prompts.prompt_text:
SYSTEM: You are a meticulous data labeler for food delivery menus. Output must be valid JSON that matches the schema. Never add extra keys.
USER: Classify this menu item into a normalized category and related attributes.
Restaurant context (optional):
- cuisines: {cuisines}
- restaurant_type: {restaurant_type}
- city: {city}
Menu item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- description: "{item_description}"
- raw_category: "{raw_category}"
- price: {price}
Return JSON:
{
  "normalized_category": "main|side|drink|dessert|addon|combo|unknown",
  "veg_flag": "veg|non_veg|unknown",
  "portion_size": "single|regular|family|unknown",
  "course_type": "meal|snack|beverage|dessert|unknown",
  "ambiguity_flag": true|false,
  "ambiguity_reason": "string (short, optional)",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}
Rules:
- If unclear: normalized_category="unknown" and ambiguity_flag=true.
- Combo/Meal/Thali/Bucket -> combo.
- Drinks include shakes, juices, soda, tea/coffee.
- Addon is extra cheese/dip/sauce/toppings/add-on.
- Side is fries/garlic bread/salad/raita/papad etc.
prompts.output_schema: JSON keys: normalized_category, veg_flag, portion_size, course_type, ambiguity_flag, ambiguity_reason, confidence

prompts.prompt_text:
SYSTEM: You generate pairing tags for cart add-on recommendations. Output only JSON.
USER:
Context:
- cuisines: {cuisines}
- city: {city}
Item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- normalized_category: "{normalized_category}"
- veg_flag: "{veg_flag}"
- price: {price}
Return JSON:
{
  "pairing_tags": ["tag1","tag2","..."],
  "avoid_with_tags": ["optional tags"],
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}
Guidelines:
- Prefer general tags like biryani_side, burger_combo, pizza_dip, dessert_after_meal, spicy_with_cooling_side.
- Avoid specific brands; keep tags generic.

SYSTEM: You extract structured semantic attributes for menu items. Output only JSON.
USER:
Item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- description: "{item_description}"
- normalized_category: "{normalized_category}"
- cuisines: {cuisines}
Return JSON:
{
  "flavor_profile": ["sweet|savory|spicy|tangy|creamy|fried|grilled|baked|cooling|unknown"],
  "spice_level": "none|low|medium|high|unknown",
  "consumption_context": "meal|snack|beverage|dessert|unknown",
  "temperature_served": "hot|cold|room|unknown",
  "dietary_notes": ["contains_dairy","contains_gluten","contains_egg","unknown"],
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}
prompts.output_schema: JSON keys: flavor_profile, spice_level, consumption_context, temperature_served, dietary_notes, confidence

prompts.prompt_text:
SYSTEM: You are a strict evaluator. Return only JSON.
USER:
Evaluate whether the normalized_category is correct.
Item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- description: "{item_description}"
- raw_category: "{raw_category}"
Proposed:
- normalized_category: "{normalized_category}"
Return JSON:
{ "score": 0.0-1.0, "pass": true|false, "reason": "one sentence" }
Pass if score >= 0.75.

SYSTEM: You are a strict evaluator for add-on recommendation features. Output only JSON.
USER:
Are these pairing tags plausible and useful?
Item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- normalized_category: "{normalized_category}"
Pairing tags:
{pairing_tags}
Return JSON:
{ "score": 0.0-1.0, "pass": true|false, "reason": "one sentence", "bad_tags": ["optional"] }
Pass if score >= 0.70.
prompts.output_schema: JSON keys: score, pass, reason, bad_tags

prompts.prompt_text:
SYSTEM: You are filtering low-quality synthetic annotations. Output only JSON.
USER:
Decide keep/reject.
Item:
- name: "{item_name}"
- description: "{item_description}"
Outputs:
- normalized_category: "{normalized_category}"
- veg_flag: "{veg_flag}"
- pairing_tags: {pairing_tags}
- confidence: {confidence}
Return JSON:
{ "keep": true|false, "reason": "short", "action": "accept|regenerate|send_to_human" }

validation_rules.description: Enums must be valid (normalized_category, veg_flag, event_type, etc.)
Timestamps must be monotonic within each session
remove_item must reference an item previously added in the session
Cart size distribution drift vs spec
Cold-start slices present in TEST split

normalized_category.description: Side dish (fries, raita, garlic bread, etc.)
